title: Basic JavaScript Higher-Order Functions
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Higher-Order Functions. Focus on implementing Functions as arguments correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Higher-Order Functions
description: Create a function that uses Functions as arguments and Functions as return values together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Higher-Order Functions Project
description: Build a small application that applies Functions as arguments, Functions as return values, Function composition in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Higher-Order Functions
description: The following code has bugs related to Functions as arguments. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Higher-Order Functions
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Functions as arguments and Functions as return values.
